This article contains one or more duplicated citations.
The reason given is: DuplicateReferences script detected:
  • http://blog.us.playstation.com/2010/03/15/coming-to-psn-this-week-patchwork-heroes/ (refs: 1, 20)
  • http://blog.us.playstation.com/2010/01/20/announcing-patchwork-heroes-for-psp/ (refs: 2, 21)
  • http://blog.eu.playstation.com/2014/05/21/singstar-coming-soon-ps4-free-microphone-app/ (refs: 3, 13, 15)
  • http://blog.eu.playstation.com/2014/11/05/muppets-movie-adventures-arrives-ps-vita-week/ (refs: 4, 22)
  • http://blog.eu.playstation.com/2014/08/08/ps-vitas-bigfest-also-coming-ps4-ps3/ (refs: 5, 24)
  • https://toio.io/news/2024/04/25.html (refs: 9, 10)
  • https://www.pcgamer.com/kotor-remake/ (refs: 11, 19)
It is recommended to use named references to consolidate citations that are used multiple times. (February 2026) (Learn how and when to remove this message)
This article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards, as Lack of organization, article would benefit from copying style of List of Nintendo products. Relevant discussion may be found on the talk page. You can help. The talk page may contain suggestions. (September 2024)
This list related to video games is incomplete; you can help by adding missing items. (October 2021)
(Learn how and when to remove this message)

The following is a list of video games published by Sony Interactive Entertainment, formerly known as Sony Computer Entertainment.

Video games

[edit]
 PSN  PlayStation Network-only release
List of games
Title System Original release date Developer(s) Notes Ref(s)

  17. ^ "【PS VR】 ｢バイオハザード｣×L'Arc-en-Ciel! 本日11月17日配信！ メンバーからのスペシャルメッセージ！". PlayStation Blog. November 17, 2016. Retrieved March 30, 2023.
  18. ^ "Shin Godzilla PlayStation VR experience launches October 13 in Japan". Gematsu. June 14, 2016. Retrieved March 30, 2023.
  19. ^ Knoop, Joseph (September 9, 2021). "Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Remake announced". PC Gamer. Archived from the original on September 9, 2021. Retrieved September 9, 2021.
